# ai-vid-edit

> An AI-powered Python tool for editing podcast and interview videos with scene detection, transcription, and intelligent processing.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/cocodedk/ai-vid-edit
- Website (EN): https://cocodedk.github.io/ai-vid-edit/
- Website (FA): https://cocodedk.github.io/ai-vid-edit/fa/
- Download: https://github.com/cocodedk/ai-vid-edit/releases/latest/download/ai-vid-edit.zip
- Author: https://cocode.dk
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/babakbandpey

## Technical Details

- Language: Python 3.12
- Package manager: uv
- Architecture: Flask web app + CLI video processing pipeline
- License: Apache-2.0

## Key Files

- `podcast-video-editor/src/podcast_video_editor/` — Core package
- `podcast-video-editor/helpers/` — Shell helper scripts
- `CLAUDE.md` — AI session instructions
